chunks.name: Backend data plane
chunks.acceptance: All 4 endpoints match frozen contract (PRD §7) plus /heartbeat has last_smoke_* fields. Check evaluator handles 5 types (file_exists, command, http_ok, db_query, smoke_list) with sandbox. smoke_list shells to scripts/smoke-probe.sh with 60s result cache. pytest + ruff + mypy clean.

chunks.name: Roadmap spine + lint
chunks.acceptance: roadmap.yaml seeded V1 (real, with one smoke_list step per V2+) + V2-V10 (stubs) + V2 demo_gate. Optional DemoGate sub-model on Version. Lint catches 3/3 drift cases + demo_gate validation. plan-to-roadmap.py appends skeleton entries idempotently with ruamel.yaml round-trip. tasks-to-plan.py --auto-roadmap invokes it. Pre-commit wired.

chunks.name: Frontend redesign
chunks.acceptance: Layout order matches PRD §6.4. Zero fs imports in /forge. Middleware token works (3 cases). Heartbeat strip has 6 chips including 'last smoke' that reads heartbeat endpoint's last_smoke_* fields. Visual pass in browser.

chunks.name: Deployment pipeline
chunks.acceptance: Systemd unit installed and active. Step 3.b inserted inside Step 3 of post-chunk.sh; Step 3.5 smoke probe preserved byte-identical (diff test). Broken-build test keeps old build serving AND does not block chunk DONE (smoke probe is the gate). End-to-end smoke probe test proves BLOCKED on broken V1 endpoint. Live smoke at atlas.jslwealth.in/forge.

phase_4_verification.qa: Run /qa against atlas.jslwealth.in/forge. Browser walk-through US-1 through US-6.
phase_4_verification.cso: OWASP + STRIDE focused on command sandbox, middleware token, Next.js proxy.
